extension.placeholder:zh-CN:
输入自然语言业务指令，例如：
- "查看最近的客户成交情况"（低风险，直通执行）
- "为供应商A创建100件钢材采购订单，单价50元"（中风险，确认后执行）
- "删除所有非活跃客户账户"（高风险，需要审批）
extension.placeholder:en:
Enter natural language business instruction, e.g.:
- "Show me recent customer sales" (low risk, direct execution)
- "Create a purchase order for 100 units of steel at $50/unit" (medium risk, confirm then execute)
- "Delete all inactive customer accounts" (high risk, requires approval)
